name: BMW of Portland
description_short: BMW of Portland is a luxury BMW dealership and Certified Center in Portland, OR, offering new, used, and CPO vehicles with in-house financing.
description_long:
BMW of Portland is a BMW Certified Center operated by the Swickard Auto Group, located at 2001 Southwest Jefferson Street in Portland, Oregon. As part of a multi-brand dealership group with a regional footprint, the dealership serves the greater Portland metropolitan area including Beaverton, Hillsboro, Tigard, Lake Oswego, and Vancouver, WA. It is one of the primary authorized BMW retailers in the Pacific Northwest.

The dealership carries a full lineup of new and pre-owned BMW vehicles across virtually every current model family: X1 through X7 SUVs, 2 through 8 Series sedans, the Z4 roadster, M performance models, XM, and the full BMW electric i-series including the i4, i5, i7, and iX. At the time of review, approximately 240 vehicles were listed in inventory. Financing is handled through an in-house finance department that works with BMW Financial Services and third-party lenders to arrange purchase or lease terms. The dealership also provides factory-certified service, OEM parts, trade-in appraisals, and scheduled maintenance.

BMW of Portland distinguishes itself through the Swickard Price Promise: a written guarantee that if a buyer finds a lower advertised price on an identical, in-stock new BMW at any authorized dealer within 25 miles within three days of purchase, the dealership will refund the difference or repurchase the vehicle. A complementary Service Match guarantee covers competitive pricing on factory-certified maintenance. The finance team specifically highlights guidance on Oregon state EV incentives and federal tax credits for i-series buyers.

Honest assessment: BMW of Portland is a mainstream luxury car dealership — not a consumer finance company. It does not belong in a lending or credit services directory. Its financing arm facilitates auto loans and leases, but rates, credit requirements, and approval criteria are not published on the website. Consumers specifically seeking auto financing should treat this as a dealership F&I department, not a standalone lender. Price points are luxury-tier, and the inventory is exclusively BMW-branded.
pros: Swickard Price Promise: price-match guarantee within 25 miles for 3 days or full vehicle buyback
Service Match guarantee for competitive pricing on BMW factory-certified maintenance
Full BMW EV lineup (i4, i5, i7, iX) with staff guidance on Oregon EV incentives and federal tax credits
BMW Certified Center status with CPO inventory carrying manufacturer warranty backing
~240 vehicles in inventory across new, used, and certified pre-owned
Seven-day showroom access including extended weekday hours (9AM–7PM Mon–Fri)
Part of Swickard Auto Group, a multi-location dealer group with regional service infrastructure
cons: No financing rates, APR ranges, or credit score requirements disclosed on the website
Exclusively BMW inventory — no cross-brand shopping or alternatives offered
Luxury price tier; entry-level new BMW models typically start above $40K
No visible online pre-qualification or soft-pull credit check tool
Finance terms negotiated in-dealership, limiting pre-visit transparency
best_for: Portland-area buyers specifically shopping for a new or certified pre-owned BMW
EV-curious buyers seeking hands-on guidance on Oregon and federal EV incentives
Buyers who prioritize price-guarantee programs and want protection against post-purchase regret
Current BMW owners seeking factory-certified service and OEM parts
diagnosis: BMW of Portland is a legitimate, full-service BMW dealership with a financing department — but it is not a consumer finance or credit services company and does not belong in a lending directory. Consumers seeking auto financing should be aware that rates and approval criteria are handled through the dealership's F&I office and BMW Financial Services, not a direct lending platform. Best suited for buyers already committed to a BMW purchase who want dealership-level financing convenience and Oregon EV incentive guidance.
services: New BMW vehicle sales (full model lineup)
In-house vehicle financing and lease structuring
BMW electric vehicle (i-series) sales and EV incentive guidance
Current lease, finance, and CPO specials
Swickard Price Promise price-match and buyback program
